description: Composition Pink viscose patiala pants, with a drawstring at the waist, pleating on the thigh and a tapered leg Fit Slim-fit Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Medium warm iron Referencing the Fall 09' Balmain collection, these pleated patiala pants, created with soft, plush fabric, are perfect to wear with your short kurtas. For those inclined to experiment in ethnic boho chic, style this with a long basic top, a waistcoat with heavy ethnic detailing, and ethnic slippers. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8”, waist 26” and hips 36”
